channel.title: Deepgram Learn
channel.description: Voice AI, speech-to-text, and developer content from Deepgram

item.title: Speech Recognition in AI: A Beginner’s Guide
item.description: Learn how speech recognition works, where it fails in production, and how to evaluate and build your first integration with a speech-to-text API.

item.title: Menu Data is Like a Box of Chocolates: What Happens When You Give Engineers the Keys and a Coke Zero, Part 2
item.description: Drive-thru menu data can be messy. AI must translate customer orders into systems, requiring context awareness and constant updates—making voice-based ordering far more complex than it seems. Here's how we do it.

item.title: Speech Recognition: How It Works and Applications
item.description: Learn how speech recognition works, the model types you'll encounter, and what separates production-grade ASR from demo performance. Built for developers.

item.title: Deepgram vs Speechmatics vs AssemblyAI: 2026 Guide
item.description: Compare Deepgram, Speechmatics, and AssemblyAI on latency, pricing, language support, and deployment. Find the right STT provider for your production workload.

item.title: Large Vocabulary Speech Recognition: A Practical Guide
item.description: Learn when Keyterm Prompting solves your OOV problem and when custom model training is the right path. A practical framework for production speech recognition.

item.title: Deepgram vs Google vs Azure: Which Cloud Provider Wins at STT?
item.description: Compare Deepgram, Google Cloud, and Azure speech-to-text on real TCO, latency, compliance, and deployment flexibility. Find the right STT provider for your stack.

item.title: Speech-to-Text for Contact Centers: Best APIs 2026
item.description: Learn which STT APIs handle real telephony conditions—narrowband audio, speaker overlap, and alphanumeric input—at contact center scale. Includes evaluation guidance.

item.title: Real-Time Speech-to-Speech Translation: Architecture Guide
item.description: Build a cascaded speech-to-speech pipeline under 500ms latency. Learn ASR, MT, and TTS architecture decisions, streaming setup, and production scaling strategies.

item.title: AI Voice Recognition: A Beginner's Guide (2026)
item.description: Learn how AI voice recognition works, what affects accuracy, and how to evaluate solutions for contact centers, healthcare, and enterprise use.

item.title: Speech Recognition in AI: A Beginner's Guide
item.description: Learn how speech recognition works, evaluate APIs, avoid real-world failures, and build your first production-ready speech-to-text integration.

item.title: Deepgram vs Speechmatics vs Rev AI: Scale Comparison
item.description: Compare Deepgram, Speechmatics, and Rev AI on concurrency limits, pricing models, latency, and compliance. Find which transcription API scales best for your workload.

item.title: How to Master Real-Time Transcription for Any Workflow
item.description: A six-phase roadmap to take real-time transcription from POC to production—covering requirements, benchmarking, integration, accuracy tuning, scaling, and compliance—while avoiding costly 4–12 week rework.

item.title: AI for Call Centers: Benefits and Best Practice Guide
item.description: Learn how AI for call centers cuts costs, improves QA, and boosts agent performance. A plain-language guide to use cases, ROI, and deployment best practices.

item.title: How AI Voice Agents Work: A Beginner's Guide
item.description: Learn how AI voice recognition works, where accuracy gaps hide, and what to evaluate before choosing a solution for contact centers, healthcare, or enterprise use.

item.title: Flux Multilingual Technical Deep Dive: Multilingual Speech-to-Text Without the Routing Mess
item.description: How Deepgram Flux Multilingual and its new `language_hint` parameter collapse multilingual voice infrastructure into a single real-time streaming connection.

item.title: Introducing Flux Multilingual: One Conversational Speech Model for Global Voice Agents
item.description: Conversational speech recognition across 10 languages in a single API. Monolingual-grade accuracy without per-language infrastructure or rebuilding your stack.

item.title: AI Voice Agent Services for Business: A 2026 Guide
item.description: Compare AI voice agent services on latency, noise tolerance, pricing, and compliance. Use this framework to run a real-world POC before you commit budget.

item.title: Deepgram Launches Flux Multilingual: The World’s First Multilingual Conversational Speech Recognition Model
item.description: One model, ten languages, and monolingual-grade accuracy for voice agents worldwide

item.title: Best Voice AI for Banking in 2026: Platform Guide
item.description: Compare voice AI platforms for banking on accuracy, compliance, and cost at scale. See how API infrastructure vs. pre-built platforms fit your environment.

item.title: Best 5 vapi AI alternatives for voice apps in 2026
item.description: Compare the best vapi AI alternatives on STT accuracy, pricing transparency, and deployment flexibility. Find the right platform for production voice apps.

item.title: How Voice AI Works: From Sound Waves to Smart Conversations
item.description: Learn how voice AI pipelines work—from ASR and NLU to TTS—and where latency, accuracy, and compliance decisions shape production outcomes.

item.title: Deepgram Agentic Engineering Tools for Voice AI Builders | Deepgram
item.description: Build voice agents faster with the dg CLI, MCP server, and the deepgram/skills repo. Three agentic engineering tools that make Deepgram a first-class citizen in Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, Codex, and Aider.

item.title: A margin doomspiral is happening in QSR, and voice AI is here to save your P&L
item.description: The QSR industry is stuck in a doomspiral. Rising labor costs and a shrinking applicant pool lead to 130% annual turnover, which leads to undertrained staff, lost revenue, and pressure to cut costs. Here's how Voice AI fixes these problems.

item.title: On-Premise Speech-to-Text: Which STT API Offers True Data Control?
item.description: When strict data control is required, the list of viable speech-to-text vendors narrows quickly. This comparison examines what Deepgram, Speechmatics, AssemblyAI, AWS, and Google Cloud publicly support for deployments that keep audio off vendor-managed infrastructure.

item.title: Deepgram vs Twilio: Real-Time Transcription Guide
item.description: Deepgram vs Twilio compared for real-time transcription. Learn when to use ConversationRelay vs Deepgram's direct API for STT control, compliance, and cost.

item.title: Deepgram vs Amazon Transcribe: 2026 Comparison
item.description: Compare Deepgram and Amazon Transcribe on accuracy, latency, pricing, and deployment to find the right fit for your voice app in 2026.

item.title: AI Drive-Thru: Voice AI for QSR Order Taking
item.description: Voice AI is reshaping QSR drive-thrus. See what production data shows about accuracy, POS integration, and scaling across locations.

item.title: Browser Agent SDK: Ship a Voice Agent on Any Web App in Minutes | Deepgram
item.description: The Browser Agent SDK is four composable npm packages that drop a Deepgram voice agent into any web app, with a clean path from one-line widget to full framework-agnostic control.

item.title: Your restaurant needs to speak Spanish, y ahora puede.
item.description: Deepgram Flux Multilingual helps restaurants deliver faster, more accurate multilingual ordering with real-time code-switching Voice AI across 10 languages. Check it out!

item.title: Deepgram Blog | AI, Engineering & More | Deepgram
item.description: Explore the latest in Voice AI on our blog. Discover advancements, tips, and trends in voice technology, plus everything about the AI world.
